user.title: ELTAKO Sensors & Actuators
user.description: Configure the gateway and serial connection. Connections found: {port_count}.

data.manual_port: Manual path, for example COM3, /dev/serial/by-id/... or tcp://host:port

name.title: Set name
name.description: The name was suggested from the selected gateway. You can change it if needed.

error.missing_port: Enter a connection or network path.

connection.title: Change gateway connection
connection.description: Change the gateway port here. The change is saved and the integration is then reloaded automatically. Connections found: {port_count}.

data.manual_port: Manual path, for example COM3, /dev/serial/by-id/... or tcp://host:port

yaml.title: Import EEDTOY YAML
yaml.description: Select exactly one import source. Manual YAML and a file path are handled in separate dialogs so an old stored path cannot block text input.

menu_options.yaml_file: Use a YAML file from the configuration directory

yaml_gateway.title: Select gateway block from YAML
yaml_gateway.description: The YAML export contains multiple gateways. Select the gateway block that belongs to this Home Assistant hub. The configuration is then saved and the integration is reloaded automatically.

yaml_text.title: Paste EEDTOY YAML
yaml_text.description: Paste the complete EEDTOY YAML export here. Any previously stored file path is ignored in this dialog. The integration is reloaded automatically after saving.

yaml_file.title: Import an EEDTOY YAML file
yaml_file.description: The file must be located inside the Home Assistant configuration directory. Valid examples: /config/eedtoy.yaml, /homeassistant/eedtoy.yaml or eedtoy.yaml. Stored manual YAML is not used in this dialog.

data.yaml_file_path: YAML file path on Home Assistant

error.missing_port: Enter a connection or network path.
error.invalid_yaml: The YAML export could not be read. Use a complete EEDTOY/Home Assistant ELTAKO YAML export.
error.no_devices_found: The YAML export was read, but no devices were found.
error.file_not_found: The YAML file was not found.
error.file_not_allowed: For security reasons, only files inside the Home Assistant configuration directory can be read.
error.yaml_source_required: Enter a YAML file path or paste the EEDTOY YAML export into the text field.
error.sender_id_collision: At least one FKS-SV sender.id is already assigned to another device or controller. Each independently controlled FKS-SV requires its own available sender ID.
error.invalid_yaml_tabs: The YAML contains invalid tab characters in its indentation. Use spaces for YAML indentation.
